title: Determination of Effective Annual Operational Times
full_text:
4.3.3.5 Determination of Effective Annual Operational Times
Determination of Effective Annual Operational Times
1) The effective annual daytime operational time of the daylighted area, teff,day,DL,i, in h/a, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: t_{eff,day,NDL,i} = t_{day,i} \times F_{occ,i} \times F_{pers,i}] where tday,i = annual operational time of space during daytime, in h, determined in accordance with Article 4.3.3.6., FDL,i = factor for daylight harvesting determined in accordance with Article 4.3.3.7., Focc,i = factor for occupancy control determined in accordance with Article 4.3.3.10., and Fpers,I = factor for personal control determined in accordance with Article 4.3.3.10.
2) The effective annual daytime operational time of the non-daylighted area, teff,day,NDL,i, in h/a, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: t_{eff,day,DL,i} = t_{day,i} \times F_{DL,i} \times F_{occ,i} \times F_{pers,i}] where tday,i = annual operational time of space during daytime, in h, determined in accordance with Article 4.3.3.6., Focc,i = factor for occupancy control determined in accordance with Article 4.3.3.10., and Fpers,i = factor for personal control determined in accordance with Article 4.3.3.10.
3) The effective annual nighttime operational time, teff,night,i, in h/a, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: \text{RCR} = \frac{5 \times H \times (L + W)}{[L \times W]}] where tnight,i = annual operational time of the space during nighttime, in h, determined in accordance with Article 4.3.3.6., Focc,i = factor for occupancy control determined in accordance with Article 4.3.3.10., and Fpers,I = factor for personal control determined in accordance with Article 4.3.3.10.

The effective annual daytime operational time of the non-daylighted area, teff,day,NDL,i, in h/a, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: t_{eff,day,DL,i} = t_{day,i} \times F_{DL,i} \times F_{occ,i} \times F_{pers,i}] where tday,i = annual operational time of space during daytime, in h, determined in accordance with Article 4.3.3.6., Focc,i = factor for occupancy control determined in accordance with Article 4.3.3.10., and Fpers,i = factor for personal control determined in accordance with Article 4.3.3.10.

The effective annual nighttime operational time, teff,night,i, in h/a, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: \text{RCR} = \frac{5 \times H \times (L + W)}{[L \times W]}] where tnight,i = annual operational time of the space during nighttime, in h, determined in accordance with Article 4.3.3.6., Focc,i = factor for occupancy control determined in accordance with Article 4.3.3.10., and Fpers,I = factor for personal control determined in accordance with Article 4.3.3.10.
